text_excerpt: Manchester Airport Parking Charges – Jim McMahon OBE MP Skip to content Jim McMahon OBE MP Labour & Co-operative | Serving the communities of Oldham West, Chadderton & Royton Menu + × expanded collapsed Biography Constituent support Visits and events News Manchester Airport Parking Charges West End St Pitches Youth Knife Crime & CCE Children in Temporary Accommodation Royton Town Centre Proposals Custody Cells & Court Provision at the new Oldham Police Station HMRC Mileage Payment Parking at Royal Oldham Hospital Saving Oldham Post Office Oldham Coliseum Dangerous Driving Costco Traffic Banking Hubs 5G Telecommunications Development Public Transport Conflict in Gaza Places for Everyone (formerly GM Spatial Framework) GM Clean Air Zone Accountability Legal notices Election 2024 Palestine Crime and gangs Oldham Coliseum Our First Year in Government Twitter Facebook Category Archives: Manchester Airport Parking Charges We need fair play on drop-off charges We are very proud of the success of Manchester Airport, but it’s got to step up and sort out its drop off payment and enforcement. And a marker is down. Gatwick’s £10 is rip off. That is a move which should be undone, not followed. Head to the link below for more Posted by JimfromOldham January 17, 2026 January 29, 2026 Posted in Jim McMahon MP news , Manchester Airport Parking Charges Leave a comment on We need fair play on drop-off charges Fair parking. Clear rules. Better access at Manchester Airport. Yesterday in Westminster Hall I spoke about the impact of parking, drop off and pick up charges at Manchester Airport, and what this means for local residents, airport workers and families travelling across Greater Manchester. Manchester Airport is a vital regional asset for our city region, supporting jobs, investment and connectivity. But many people continue Continue reading “Fair parking. Clear rules. Better access at Manchester Airport.” Posted by JimfromOldham January 14, 2026 January 29, 2026 Posted in Jim McMahon MP news , Manchester Airport Parking Charges Leave a comment on Fair parking. Clear rules. Better access at Manchester Airport. Oldham Council backs changes to Airport parking charges! A big thank you to Oldham Labour Group for putting forward a motion at Council and backing my campaign for a fairer parking scheme at Manchester Airport and I’m grateful that the motion received unanimous support across the council. Oldham Council is a shareholder in the airport, and tonight’s united position sends a very clear Continue reading “Oldham Council backs changes to Airport parking charges!” Posted by JimfromOldham December 11, 2025 January 29, 2026 Posted in Jim McMahon MP news , Manchester Airport Parking Charges Leave a comment on Oldham Council backs changes to Airport parking charges! Tackling issues with Parking, Drop-off & Pick-up Charges at Manchester Airport It was great to be at Manchester Airport last week to meet with Managing Director Chris Woodroofe as the next step on our campaign to change the airport’s approach to drop-off and collections charges, given the impact on drivers who find themselves faced with unfair charges.
